name: label
description: Renders an accessible label associated with a form control.

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue';
import { Label } from '@soybeanjs/headless/label';
import { labelVariants } from '@/styles/label';
import type { LabelProps } from './types';

defineOptions({
  name: 'SLabel'
});

const props = defineProps<LabelProps>();

const cls = computed(() => labelVariants({ size: props.size }, props.class));
</script>

<template>
  <Label :for="props.for" :class="cls">
    <slot />
  </Label>
</template>

export type ThemeColor = 'primary' | 'destructive' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'info' | 'carbon' | 'secondary' | 'accent';

export type ThemeSize = 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl';
